subject: Cost Reduction Initiative - Phase 2 Results
body:
Executive Team,

Phase 2 of our cost optimization initiative has been completed. Results:

Total Annual Savings Achieved: $2.1M

Breakdown by Category:

1. Cloud Infrastructure Optimization: $680K
   - Right-sized 40% of EC2 instances
   - Implemented spot instances for non-critical workloads
   - Consolidated 3 redundant data pipelines

2. Software License Rationalization: $420K
   - Eliminated 12 unused SaaS subscriptions
   - Renegotiated enterprise agreements (see vendor update email)
   - Standardized on single BI tool (retired 2 overlapping tools)

3. Operational Efficiency: $540K
   - Automated 15 manual reporting processes
   - Consolidated customer support tiers
   - Reduced contractor spend by transitioning to FTEs

4. Facilities: $460K
   - Reduced office space by 30% (hybrid work model)
   - Renegotiated cleaning and maintenance contracts
   - Optimized energy usage with smart building controls

Total Phases 1+2 savings: $3.4M (exceeded $3M target)

Phase 3 will focus on procurement process automation. Kickoff: April 1st.
